import re, pathlib, yaml

blog = pathlib.Path("content/english/blog")
published = []
for p in sorted(blog.glob("*.md")):
    if p.name == "_index.md": continue
    text = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    if not re.search(r"^draft:\s*false\s*$", text, re.M):
        continue
    # split frontmatter
    m = re.match(r"^---\n(.*?)\n---\n(.*)$", text, re.S)
    if not m:
        continue
    try:
        fm = yaml.safe_load(m.group(1)) or {}
    except Exception as e:
        fm = {}
    body = m.group(2)
    words = len(re.findall(r"\w+", body))
    cats = fm.get("categories") or []
    opener = body[:400]
    has_i = bool(re.search(r"\b(I|I'm|I've|my)\b", opener))
    h2s = re.findall(r"^## (.+)$", body, re.M)
    published.append((p.name, words, cats, has_i, h2s[:5], fm.get("title","")))

for name, words, cats, has_i, h2s, title in published:
    cat = cats[0] if cats else "?"
    print(f"{name:45} {words:5}w  I-opener:{has_i}  [{cat}]  {title[:50]}")
print(f"\nTotal published: {len(published)}")

```bash
import re, pathlib, yaml

blog = pathlib.Path("content/english/blog")
published = []
for p in sorted(blog.glob("*.md")):
    if p.name == "_index.md": continue
    text = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    if not re.search(r"^draft:\s*false\s*$", text, re.M):
        continue
    # split frontmatter
    m = re.match(r"^---\n(.*?)\n---\n(.*)$", text, re.S)
    if not m:
        continue
    try:
        fm = yaml.safe_load(m.group(1)) or {}
    except Exception as e:
        fm = {}
    body = m.group(2)
    words = len(re.findall(r"\w+", body))
    cats = fm.get("categories") or []
    opener = body[:400]
    has_i = bool(re.search(r"\b(I|I'm|I've|my)\b", opener))
    h2s = re.findall(r"^## (.+)$", body, re.M)
    published.append((p.name, words, cats, has_i, h2s[:5], fm.get("title","")))

for name, words, cats, has_i, h2s, title in published:
    cat = cats[0] if cats else "?"
    print(f"{name:45} {words:5}w  I-opener:{has_i}  [{cat}]  {title[:50]}")
print(f"\nTotal published: {len(published)}")
```

<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 << 'PY'
import re, pathlib, yaml

blog = pathlib.Path("content/english/blog")

def parse_post(p):
    text = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    m = re.match(r"^---\n(.*?)\n---\n(.*)$", text, re.S)
    if not m: return None
    fm = yaml.safe_load(m.group(1)) or {}
    if fm.get("draft") is not False:
        return None
    return fm, m.group(2)

# slop-ish patterns
patterns = {
    "bottom_line": r"^## Bottom line\s*$",
    "further_reading_3plus": None,
    "users_should": r"\b(users|one) (should|might|may)\b",
    "passive_advice": r"it is recommended|it's important to note",
    "wiki_footer": r"Expanded from|Idea captured from",
    "placeholder_img": None,
    "generic_opener": r"^(In today's|When it comes to|.* has become increasingly)",
}

issues = []
for p in sorted(blog.glob("*.md")):
    if p.name.startswith("_"): continue
    parsed = parse_post(p)
    if not parsed: continue
    fm, body = parsed
    hits = []
    if fm.get("image") == "/images/image-template.jpg":
        hits.append("placeholder-image")
    for name, pat in patterns.items():
        if pat and re.search(pat, body, re.I|re.M):
            hits.append(name)
    # further reading links
    sec = re.search(r"^## Further (reading|reference).*?(?=^## |\Z)", body, re.S|re.M|re.I)
    if sec:
        links = len(re.findall(r"https?://", sec.group(0)))
        if links >= 3:
            hits.append(f"further-reading-{links}-links")
    # sections without specifics (very rough: no digit, no proper noun-ish caps mid-sentence)
    sections = re.split(r"^## ", body, flags=re.M)[1:]
    thin_sections = []
    for sec in sections:
        title_line, _, content = sec.partition("\n")
        words = len(re.findall(r"\w+", content))
        has_specific = bool(re.search(r"\d|JoRap|Hugo|WordPress|Facebook|GitHub|Cloudflare|Instant Pot|Shopee|I almost|I learned|wrong|broke|failed|annoy", content, re.I))
        if words > 40 and not has_specific:
            thin_sections.append(title_line.strip()[:40])
    if thin_sections:
        hits.append("thin-sections:" + ";".join(thin_sections[:2]))
    if hits:
        issues.append((p.name, hits))

for name, hits in issues:
    print(f"{name}: {', '.join(hits)}")
if not issues:
    print("No automated pattern hits on published posts")
PY</summary>

```bash
cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 << 'PY'
import re, pathlib, yaml

blog = pathlib.Path("content/english/blog")

def parse_post(p):
    text = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    m = re.match(r"^---\n(.*?)\n---\n(.*)$", text, re.S)
    if not m: return None
    fm = yaml.safe_load(m.group(1)) or {}
    if fm.get("draft") is not False:
        return None
    return fm, m.group(2)

# slop-ish patterns
patterns = {
    "bottom_line": r"^## Bottom line\s*$",
    "further_reading_3plus": None,
    "users_should": r"\b(users|one) (should|might|may)\b",
    "passive_advice": r"it is recommended|it's important to note",
    "wiki_footer": r"Expanded from|Idea captured from",
    "placeholder_img": None,
    "generic_opener": r"^(In today's|When it comes to|.* has become increasingly)",
}

issues = []
for p in sorted(blog.glob("*.md")):
    if p.name.startswith("_"): continue
    parsed = parse_post(p)
    if not parsed: continue
    fm, body = parsed
    hits = []
    if fm.get("image") == "/images/image-template.jpg":
        hits.append("placeholder-image")
    for name, pat in patterns.items():
        if pat and re.search(pat, body, re.I|re.M):
            hits.append(name)
    # further reading links
    sec = re.search(r"^## Further (reading|reference).*?(?=^## |\Z)", body, re.S|re.M|re.I)
    if sec:
        links = len(re.findall(r"https?://", sec.group(0)))
        if links >= 3:
            hits.append(f"further-reading-{links}-links")
    # sections without specifics (very rough: no digit, no proper noun-ish caps mid-sentence)
    sections = re.split(r"^## ", body, flags=re.M)[1:]
    thin_sections = []
    for sec in sections:
        title_line, _, content = sec.partition("\n")
        words = len(re.findall(r"\w+", content))
        has_specific = bool(re.search(r"\d|JoRap|Hugo|WordPress|Facebook|GitHub|Cloudflare|Instant Pot|Shopee|I almost|I learned|wrong|broke|failed|annoy", content, re.I))
        if words > 40 and not has_specific:
            thin_sections.append(title_line.strip()[:40])
    if thin_sections:
        hits.append("thin-sections:" + ";".join(thin_sections[:2]))
    if hits:
        issues.append((p.name, hits))

for name, hits in issues:
    print(f"{name}: {', '.join(hits)}")
if not issues:
    print("No automated pattern hits on published posts")
PY
```

import re, pathlib, yaml

blog = pathlib.Path("content/english/blog")
drafts, published = [], []
for p in sorted(blog.glob("*.md")):
    if p.name in ("_index.md",): continue
    text = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    m = re.match(r"^---\n(.*?)\n---\n(.*)$", text, re.S)
    if not m: continue
    fm = yaml.safe_load(m.group(1)) or {}
    body = m.group(2)
    words = len(re.findall(r"\w+", body))
    is_draft = fm.get("draft") is not False
    row = (p.name, words, fm.get("title","")[:45])
    (drafts if is_draft else published).append(row)

print("=== DRAFTS (", len(drafts), ") ===")
for r in sorted(drafts, key=lambda x: x[1]):
    flag = " OUTLINE" if r[1] < 80 else (" THIN" if r[1] < 300 else "")
    print(f"{r[1]:5}w {r[0]:42}{flag}")

    print(f"{r[1]:5}w {r[0]:42}{flag}")

```bash
cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 << 'PY'
import re, pathlib, yaml

blog = pathlib.Path("content/english/blog")
drafts, published = [], []
for p in sorted(blog.glob("*.md")):
    if p.name in ("_index.md",): continue
    text = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    m = re.match(r"^---\n(.*?)\n---\n(.*)$", text, re.S)
    if not m: continue
    fm = yaml.safe_load(m.group(1)) or {}
    body = m.group(2)
    words = len(re.findall(r"\w+", body))
    is_draft = fm.get("draft") is not False
    row = (p.name, words, fm.get("title","")[:45])
    (drafts if is_draft else published).append(row)

print("=== DRAFTS (", len(drafts), ") ===")
for r in sorted(drafts, key=lambda x: x[1]):
    flag = " OUTLINE" if r[1] < 80 else (" THIN" if r[1] < 300 else "")
    print(f"{r[1]:5}w {r[0]:42}{flag}")
print("\n=== PUBLISHED (", len(published), ") ===")
for r in sorted(published, key=lambda x: x[1]):
    flag = " SHORT" if r[1] < 400 else ""
    print(f"{r[1]:5}w {r[0]:42}{flag}")
PY
```

_**Agent (auto-low)**_

# JoRap Voice Review — All Blogs

**Scope:** 60 files under `content/english/blog/` (24 published, 35 drafts, 1 section index). Reviewed against jorap-voice seven passes, slop gate, and voice check.

**Automated gates:** All clean on live posts.

| Check | Result |
|-------|--------|
| `pnpm lint:voice` | Pass — no strict hits, no em dashes |
| `pnpm lint:slop` | Pass — no publish blockers on live posts |
| `pnpm voice:scan` | 0 strict hits on blogs; review-only words (`deploy`, `framework`, `navigate`) are fine in dev context |

Published posts have no wiki-export footers, no `users should` / `it is recommended`, no placeholder heroes, and all meet the 80-word floor.

---

## Overall verdict

**The published corpus is in good shape.** Most live posts sound like JoRap — first person, specific friction, clear takes. The weak spots are not vocabulary slop; they're **guide-shaped middle sections** (could paste into any blog) and a few **overlapping ownership essays**.

Drafts split into three buckets: **publish-ready with a hero image**, **needs one lived-in pass**, and **outline/thin** (especially Hugo tutorial stubs).

---

## Published — tiered

### Tier A — reference voice (swap test passes)

These match the skill's reference posts. Keep them as models.

| Post | Why it works |
|------|----------------|
| `what-i-look-for-in-wireless-earphones.md` | Drawer full of failures, opinionated headings, concrete scenes |
| `why-i-stopped-playing-marvel-snap.md` | Honest quit story, visible thinking |
| `mouse-wheel-click.md` | One weird habit, practical, specific |
| `extension-cord.md` | Hotel-outlet story, "what I pack" close |
| `miracle-isaiah-david.md` | Faith post with lived narrative |
| `how-i-built-jorap-notes.md` | Hosting loss → stack choice, earned take |
| `why-i-focused-on-open-source.md` | Philippines context, host-died story, not manifesto |
| `drupal-to-wordpress.md` | Career-market reasoning, not CMS fanboyism |
| `hanamikoji-duopoly-retheme.md` | Deep hobby post with personal stakes |
| `hugoplate-theme-review.md` | Saturday theme-shopping trap, what bit you |
| `consistent-ai-output-wordpress-builds.md` | Month-one vs month-three arc, contractor metaphor |
| `facebook-favorites-feed.md` | "Can't quit Messenger" opener, over-favoriting mistake |

### Tier B — good, polish if you touch them

Voice is there; some H2 sections fail the **one-failure-per-section** rule or the swap test.

| Post | Issue | Suggested pass |
|------|-------|----------------|
| `getting-started-with-rss-feeds.md` | Strong opener and closer; middle ("What RSS actually is", "Why it's worth bothering") reads like a solid beginner guide | Add one scene per definitional section (your old tab-hunting routine, the friend conversation) |
| `why-run-your-own-website.md` | "You get to make it look like *you*" and "It's a real portfolio" shift to second-person generic | Rewrite with *your* site choices — why Hugoplate, why the notes garden layout |
| `why-keep-desktop-laptop.md` | Ergonomics/storage sections are advice-shaped | One body-wrist or disk-full story each |
| `static-site-vs-cms.md` | "When I reach for a static site" is criteria without a client misfire | Name one project that went wrong on the wrong stack |
| `sustainable-online-publishing.md` | Thin (563w), overlaps `why-run-your-own-website` | Fine as habit companion — sharpen "What I don't mean" with one hosting-loss callback (you have it; make the sections less parallel) |
| `worship-pads-solo-guitar.md` | Definitional opener section is fine for tips genre | Already recovers in "VLC near-disaster" — no urgent fix |
| `one-page-zine.md` | Mostly strong | Minor: "Other places I would use it" could use one named game night |
| Recipe trio (`instant-pot-*`, `set-it-forget-it-*`) | Instructional by design | Section intros already human; OK |

### Tier C — different genre (voice rules apply differently)

| Post | Notes |
|------|-------|
| `dnpap-song-resources.md` (206w) | Link hub, not essay. Intro is personal (Pia, COVID recording). Voice OK for purpose. |
| `alex-eala-pro-career-tracker.md` (5.9k w) | Scrapbook/data page. Opener has `I`; body is reference by design. Not an essay — don't force narrative into stat blocks. |

---

## Recurring patterns (published)

1. **TL;DR blocks** on dev posts (`consistent-ai-output`, `why-i-focused-on-open-source`) — works for that audience; fine to keep.
2. **Bold lead-ins on list items** (`getting-started-with-rss-feeds`, `facebook-favorites-feed`) — slightly listicle-shaped but saved by first-person framing.
3. **"What X actually is" headings** — fine when followed by a story; weak when followed by definition only.
4. **No currency violations** on published posts.
5. **Review-only lint words** (`deploy`, `framework`, `navigate`) appear in dev posts — context-appropriate; no action needed.

---

## Drafts — publish readiness

### Ready-ish (voice mostly there → hero image + light pass)

| Draft | Words | Notes |
|-------|------:|-------|
| `__mi-box-s.md` | 555 | Solid gear review; add real hero, maybe one app/storage failure |
| `__wifi-router.md` | 714 | Good checklist voice; add named router or reboot story |
| `__humanize-ai-articles.md` | 487 | Meta but on-brand; ironic "When it comes to" quote is intentional |
| `__password-managers.md` | 538 | Run passes #1 + #6 before publish |
| `__smart-plug.md` | 653 | Same |
| `__shopee-tips.md` | 524 | Philippines grounding — good fit |
| `__second-cellphone.md` | 588 | |
| `__canon-g3000.md` | 491 | |
| `__client-site-pass-off.md` | 946 | |
| `__selling-static-sites.md` | 1018 | |
| `__grade-1-better-than-kumon.md` | 3425 | Long; check opinion sections for first-person openers |

**Blocker for all:** `image-template.jpg` hero (29 drafts flagged by `pnpm slop:scan`).

### Needs a lived-in rewrite before publish

| Draft | Words | Problem |
|-------|------:|---------|
| `__obsidian-vs-hugo.md` | 241 | Bullet dumps, no scene, reads like notes not post |
| `__markdown-deep-dive.md` | 364 | Tutorial-shaped; lacks "broke my build" stories beyond one line |
| `__native-hugo-taxonomies.md` | 343 | Hugo tutorial voice |
| `__hugo-shortcodes.md` | 383 | Same |
| `__tailwind-css-v4.md` | 385 | Same |
| `__jobs-to-be-done-framework.md` | 394 | Framework explainer risk |
| `__how-to-create-a-good-habit.md` | 341 | Generic habit-post shape |
| `__immune-booster-supplements.md` | 305 | Needs personal trial/failure or cut |

**Tutorial drafts** (`__hugo-*`, `__markdown-formatting.md`, etc.): structurally fine as references, but jorap-voice wants **one real project scar per section** — not "here's how bundles work."

### Not a post yet

| Draft | Words |
|-------|------:|
| `__how-to-create-a-blog-template.md` | 0 — empty shell |
| `__blog-template.md` | 1682 — internal Hugo reference, not JoRap essay |

---

## Highest-impact fixes (if you want a batch)

**Published (low effort, high swap-test gain):**

1. `getting-started-with-rss-feeds.md` — personal scene in "What RSS actually is"
2. `why-run-your-own-website.md` — rewrite two second-person sections in first person
3. `sustainable-online-publishing.md` — trim overlap with #2 or merge long-term

**Drafts (before first publish):**

1. Replace `image-template.jpg` on anything you plan to ship
2. `__obsidian-vs-hugo.md` — expand from bullets to one garage→garden workflow story
3. `__mi-box-s.md` / `__wifi-router.md` — closest to done; images + one failure each

---

## Voice check summary (published corpus)

| Criterion | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| Opens with experience, not dictionary | 24/24 |
| First person in first 400 chars (opinion/faith/games) | Pass where applicable |
| One specific per major section | ~18/24 strong; 6 with thin sections (Tier B) |
| Visible thinking / honest doubt | Strong on opinion, gear, faith, games |
| Plain words / no AI phrases | Clean |
| No slop publish blockers | Clean |
| Swap test | Tier A passes; Tier B has 6–8 sections that could run anywhere |

---

I did not edit any files. Say which tier you want tackled first (published polish, draft publish queue, or a specific post), and I can rewrite in place.

---

do all tiers then work on all drafts
